name: Blender Action: Export OBJ
description: Creates a Blender action to export geometry as OBJ. Uses bpy.ops.wm.obj_export (Blender 4.0+) or bpy.ops.export_scene.obj (3.x), auto-selected by the runner.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]
    obj_path = inputs.get('obj_path') or self.get_parameter('obj_path', '')
    selection_only = inputs.get('selection_only')
    if selection_only is None:
        selection_only = self.get_parameter('selection_only', False)
    action = {'type': 'export_obj', 'obj_path': obj_path, 'selection_only': bool(selection_only)}
    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added export_obj action -> {obj_path}')
    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
